---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the approach you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds.

## Safety Impact
Does this feature affect the safety-critical path?
- [ ] Yes – affects hazard detection, motor control, or emergency stop
- [ ] No – advisory/UI only

## Additional Context
Diagrams, mockups, or related issues.
